reviews.author: Ankur K.
reviews.title: Awesome lock
reviews.body: Really nice. Got it installed today. The installation person knows about the device and was very professional. He did it very neatly. They lock has good features and yet to use them in real life.

reviews.author: Shalini
reviews.title: The door should be thicker than 35mm
reviews.body: Very good service and technician. Super fast service and easy to understand and use. Will definitely recommend to get it.
